title: Delhi HC summons EOW officer accused of threatening litigant, behaving rudely with lawyer
description: The Delhi High Court has summoned a Sub-Inspector (SI) from the Economic Offences Wing at Gurugram after the representatives of a financial services company claimed that he threatened them after they approached the Court.The company also alleged that the Investigating Officer (IO), SI Sanjay, had behaved rudely with its lawyer over the phone when she attempted to serve him notice of a petition filed by the company for de-freezing of bank account.The petitioner highlighted these claims in an appl
